title: Then & Now Sort
description: A history-for-preschoolers matching game where kids pair an old object with a new object that does the same job.
learningGoals: Connect objects by their shared function
Build early history vocabulary through concrete examples
interactionModel: match-pairs tap cards that share a purpose across time
feedbackModel: Correct pairs get pop and sparkle SFX plus a spoken shared-job line; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
